title: stachys riederi var. hispidula
intro: Stachys riederi var. hispidula, also known as hispid Stachys or prickly wood betony, is a variety of the Stachys riederi plant species, a type of herbaceous perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stachys riederi var. hispidula include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Stachys riederi var. hispidula is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
